assertions.text: earns-the-name: The description earns/justifies the 'Death March' name rather than softening it
assertions.evidence: Describes the route as 'epic' and notes 'Your legs will hate you for days' but never references the 'Death March' name or leans into it — tone is promotional rather than punishing

assertions.text: suffering-to-reward-arc: Captures the arc: brutal upper section → beautiful lower canyon payoff
assertions.evidence: 'serious quad-burning commitment' → 'The lower canyon is the payoff... almost otherworldly compared to the punishment above'

assertions.text: mentions-car-shuttle: Mentions the car shuttle requirement as a practical necessity
assertions.evidence: 'This epic point-to-point demands a car shuttle' — opening sentence

assertions.text: sensory-specifics: Uses sensory or physical detail (quads, creek, wildflowers, snow, etc.) rather than vague adjectives
assertions.evidence: Elevation figures, 'snow until June', 'wildflowers in July', 'shaded singletrack', 'quad-burning'

assertions.text: no-generic-opener: Does NOT start with a generic opener like 'Nestled in...' or 'If you're looking for...'
assertions.evidence: Opens with 'This epic point-to-point demands a car shuttle...'
